ranking_rationale: cbrt=closest structural match: no-param numeric op with vConstFloatPrgm constants in init + fp16b rounding + same ITERATIONS loop pattern; rpow=shows multi-step arithmetic computation using sfpi vector ops and how to handle numeric stability/special cases; hardsigmoid=simplest no-param init+loop structure, clean dst_reg pattern, no SfpuType init callback (atanh needs SfpuType entry); hardtanh=tanh-family operation showing two-param dispatch and how tanh-related ops are wired in the split-includes path; softshrink=shows parametrized LLK dispatch including the init+params pattern, and how a math-focused op without sfpu primitives structures its kernel
